catalog_specs:
• Building a Family Tree Requires five steps
    1. Build Nested Architechture
    2. Configure Root Branch
    3. Generate Family Tree
    4. Deploy to Web
    5. Monitor and Respond to Clicks
  • The root branch is configured to display the root's photo, age, year born, year died (if deceased), and the root's narrative.  The names of the root's descendant children are also configured (in birth sequence order).
  • Next, the root's family tree skeleton, complete with demographic information, and the names of the root's descendant children, is generated into a start up family tree.
  • After the start up family tree is generated, the root's descendant children can begin building out their branches, at their birth sequence, on the root's family tree.
catalog_price:
1. $325.00
  2. This is a one-time cost that covers building, configuring, generating, and deploying a starter Family Tree to the web (and responding to its clicks).
  3. The starter Family Tree displays the root's demographic information, the names of the root's descendant children, and a Family Tree Birthdays button.
  4. At this point, the Family Tree is not functional.  The Family Tree will become functional (respond to clicks) when descendant child branches or child clicks are added to it.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Family Tree)
  • Root Narrative Limited to 200 Words.
  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
  • If root is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

catalog_specs:
• Building out their family tree branch is how descendant children add themselves and their children to their parent's family tree.
  • From generation to generation, descendant children (who have children of their own), must build out their family tree branch, at their birth sequence, on their parent's tree.
  • If a descendant child is under age, the parent can add a child click to display the under age child's information.
  • Activating descendant child clicks and adding child narratives are optional (you don't have to do).

Steps to Do . . .


  1. Configure Branch Architechture
  2. Build Branch Profile
  3. Implement Branch Photo
  4. Type Branch Narrative
  5. Display Branch Profile
  6. Configure Branch Children
  7. Display Branch Children Names
  8. Configure Family Tree Link
catalog_price:
1. $125.00  (Build and Configure Family Tree Branch)

  2. $15.00  (Per Optional Child Click)

If child clicks are not purchased, the child's name will be displayed underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Head-of-Family)
  • Family Tree Branch Narrative Limited to 200 Words.
  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
  • If the family branch head is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

  • Per (Child Click)
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Child Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
  • If child is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

catalog_specs:
• If you built a family tree branch (above) without including optional child clicks, because the branch was closed (without them), there's an additional cost to add them after branch closure.

Steps to Do . . .


  1. Activate Child Click
  2. Display Child Profile when Child Name is Clicked
catalog_price:
$20.00  Per (Child Click)

  • If Child Clicks are not purchased, the child's name will be displayed underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Click)
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Child Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
  • If child is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death

catalog_specs:
• Only Family Tree Branches for head-of-family have 200 word narratives included in their price. Child Narratives are at additional cost.
  • A child narrative can be used to pay a special tribute, memorialize a dearly departed loved one, give praise, or give a synopsis of a person's life story.

Steps to Do . . .


  1. Activate Child Click
  2. Display Child Profile when Child Name is Clicked
  3. Type Child Narrative
  4. Display Child Narrative when Child's Family Tree Link is Clicked
catalog_price:
$25.00


  • Child narratives are optional.  If not purchased, when the descendant child's Family Tree Link is clicked, no narrative will appear.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Narrative)
  • Child Narrative Limited to 200 Words.
  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
